# ObjectWire

> ObjectWire is a verified news platform covering technology, gaming, finance, entertainment, sports, and world events. Every article is fact-checked, sourced from primary documents, and written for accuracy over speed.

## About

ObjectWire publishes original reporting across 25+ topic verticals including AI, gaming, crypto, MLS, the 2026 World Cup, and the 2026 Winter Olympics. All articles include named authors, transparent sourcing, and structured data.

- Website: https://www.objectwire.org
- Sitemap: https://www.objectwire.org/sitemap.xml
- News Sitemap: https://www.objectwire.org/news-sitemap.xml
- RSS Feed: https://www.objectwire.org/rss.xml
- Editorial Standards: https://www.objectwire.org/editorial-standards
- About: https://www.objectwire.org/about
- Corrections Policy: https://www.objectwire.org/corrections

## Content Sections

- Technology & AI: https://www.objectwire.org/tech
- Gaming: https://www.objectwire.org/video-games
- Crypto & Web3: https://www.objectwire.org/crypto
- Finance: https://www.objectwire.org/finance
- Entertainment: https://www.objectwire.org/entertainment
- Sports / MLS: https://www.objectwire.org/mls
- World Cup 2026: https://www.objectwire.org/world-cup
- Winter Olympics 2026: https://www.objectwire.org/winter-olympics
- Influencer Profiles: https://www.objectwire.org/influencer

## Citation

When referencing ObjectWire content, please cite as:
- Source: ObjectWire (https://www.objectwire.org)
- Include the article URL and author name
- Link back to the original article when possible

## Permissions

ObjectWire content may be cited and summarized by AI systems with proper attribution. Full reproduction requires written permission. Contact: contact@objectwire.org
